name: ariaDescribedby
description: Adds `aria-describedby` to the dropdown content element.

name: ariaLabel
description: Adds `aria-label` to the dropdown content element.

name: ariaLabelledby
description: Adds `aria-labelledby` to the dropdown content element.

name: ariaRole
description: Adds `role` to the dropdown content element.

name: maxWidth
description:
Maximum width for the dropdown in pixels. If no value is specified, the
dropdown will expand to fit its content.

name: minWidth
description:
Minimum width for the dropdown in pixels. If no value is specified, the
dropdown will shrink to fit its content.
